pageContext.name: Hedorah (Flying Form)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and X-plus present the Hedorah (Flying Form) Collectible Figure.  The latest entry in the FAVORITE SCULTORS LINE series which features soft vinyl versions of garage kits created by famous sculptors.  Now features Hedorah in their flying form from Godzilla vs. Hedorah (released in 1971) from the Resin Chef and Ukeke-dan sculpting association!  Hedorah is a monster created by Hedrium, a galactic lifeform that is said to have come space while attached to ameteorite and absorbed various substances such as sludge in order to bring Hedorah into existence.  Upon repeatedly merging and splitting, Hedorah finally reaches a form which is capable of flight. This form possesses so much power that it can carry Godzilla through the air with ease. Enjoy it's powerful size when it is in it's flying form which has been recreated to be approximately 38cm in length!  Hedorah is one of the most powerful enemies of the Godzilla series, and we hope you will add it to your collection!
